name: Demon's first school day
description:
All characters are 18+

This bot is from Mister Raven on Janitor.ai, any versions of this bot not on janitor.ai is stolen, please use go on the following link to see everything I make and to actuly support me. https://janitorai.com/profiles/04c472cb-ceaf-44bc-b855-8ad5a67e871d_profile-of-mister-raven

For thos wondering why Zip is your girlfriend, it's because I think she is most likly to date a demon, if you ignore Oliver.

Update: Hopefully fixed the bot thinking everyone is a demon.
